text: Good afternoon.
Thank you for calling SkyPass Travel Solutions.
My name is Fiona.
How may I assist you with your flight booking today?

Finally! I've been on hold for 20 minutes. Listen, Fiona, I just got an alert saying my flight to Chicago tomorrow morning was changed from 10 a.m. to 7 a.m. This is completely unacceptable. I am not waking up at 4 in the morning just because you're company.
I am so sorry for the surprise schedule change, ma 'am. I completely understand that a three -hour shift is incredibly inconvenient.
Let me look at your booking right away so I can...

Don't just apologize. Fix it. My name is Regina Vance. The booking code is XYZ552. I have an incredibly important business presentation at 2 p .m. and moving my flight to 7 a .m. completely ruins my entire morning schedule. I demand you change it back to 10 a .m.
right.
Thank you, Regina. I have pulled up your itinerary. I see the shift here.
Just to explain briefly, the airline actually canceled the 10 a .m. aircraft due to a mechanical issue, so they automatically moved all passengers to the earlier...

I don't care about their mechanical issues. That is your problem to solve, not mine. Why am I being penalized for their broken planes? If that flight is canceled, then put me on a different airline at 10 a.m.
I know for a fact United Airlines has a flight around that time, so just transfer my ticket over.
I completely hear you, Regina. Let me check the live availability for the United Airlines at 10.15 a.m. for you right now.
Okay, I do see open seats in their cabin, but because it is a different airline alliance, our system requires...
I don't care about your system's requirements or your alliances. Do you not understand what urgent business means?
I paid full price for a premium ticket on your website, and I expect you to click whatever buttons you need to click to make this right.
I am not hanging up this phone until I get...
I understand completely, and I am not going to hang up until we have a solution you are happy with.
I am currently bypassing the automated system to issue a priority partner override.
This will allow me to transfer your booking to the United Airlines at 10 .15 a .m.
without charging you any...
Well, do it faster, then. Why does everything take so long with you people?
And what about my baggage? If you transfer me to United, is my luggage going to get lost in transition, or are you actually going to manually ensure that it...
Your baggage data will sync perfectly, Regina.
I am manually linking your original baggage tags directly to the new United Airlines profile right now.
You will check in at the United desk tomorrow morning, exactly like normal, and your baggage will...

Fine. They better be there when I land. Now, what about my seat assignment? I originally paid extra for an aisle seat in row 5 because I need to get off the plane quickly for my meeting. If you put me in a middle seat at the back of the plane, I'm going to be absolutely...
I completely understand.

Quick deplaning is crucial for your schedule. I have just checked the United seating map, and I was able to secure seat 4C for you, which is a premium aisle seat even closer to the front of the aircraft. I have also waived the fee for that selection as a gesture of our...

Fine. Row 4? Hmm. Well, I suppose that is acceptable. Send the new boarding passes to my email immediately. I need to print them out before I leave the office tonight. And make sure the confirmation number doesn't...

I have just clicked Send, Regina. The new United Airlines e-ticket and confirmation code should be hitting your inbox in about 30 seconds. I highly recommend checking your spam folder, just in case it takes a moment to route through.
Is there any other detail I can double-check for your travel tomorrow?
No, that's all. Next time, your agency needs to notify people before you go changing their lives around. Goodbye.
We will certainly take that feedback to heart, Regina.
Safe travels on your flight tomorrow,
best of luck with your business presentation, and have a wonderful evening.
Let's have a evening.
